description: §14.8.9 — an explicit SAFE projection that never selects the protected column engages no redaction: no E-PROTECT-* / I-PROTECT-* code fires. The positive control for the strip/fail-closed cases — the floor only acts on a protected-origin column.
rationale: §14.8.9 the redaction keys on a column's resolved (table,column) origin; SELECT id, name carries no protected-origin column, so the egress serializer has nothing to strip and no strip/fail-closed diagnostic fires. Proves the floor is precise, not blanket.
